heading: Behavior
body:
When you query embedded documents in arrays using the
`embeddedDocument` operator, MongoDB Search evaluates and scores the operator
query predicates at different stages of query execution. MongoDB Search:

- Evaluates each embedded document in the array independently.

- Combines the scores of matching results as configured using the
  [embedded](scoring-embedded) option, or scores by summing the scores of
  matching results if you don't specify an [embedded](scoring-embedded)
  score option.

- Joins the matching results with the parent document if other
  query predicates are specified through the [compound](compound-ref).
